'''Mynor Dac''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who flew with [[Twin Suns Squadron]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] under the command of [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
